game_info.title: Neon Stack
game_info.concept:
Stack up the blocks as high as you can!

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/stack/id1080487957

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Stack up the blocks as high as you can!

◉ Simple & Beautiful graphics designed
◉ Compete for the best score in the world
game_info.description: Neon Stack is a high-precision architectural arcade game. A block slides horizontally across the screen, and your objective is to stop it precisely on top of the block below. Any overhang is sliced off, causing the tower to become narrower and harder to build. Stack as high as you can to achieve a high score. Reaching 50 blocks constitutes a Master Win!
game_info.controls:
- ENTER: Start the game
- SPACE: Place the current moving block
- ESC: Pause or Unpause the game
- R: Restart the game (from Game Over screens)

TEST_1.test_description: Precision Stacker Bot. This test verifies the game physics and slicing mechanics by attempting to stack blocks as perfectly as possible.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The bot monitors the position of the currently moving block and the top block of the stack. When the horizontal difference is within a small threshold (less than the movement speed), it triggers a SPACE key press to place the block.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The bot should consistently stack blocks, maintaining a wide tower and eventually reaching the win condition of 50 blocks without losing.

TEST_2.test_description: Chaos Bot. This test verifies the fail state and error handling by providing erratic inputs.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The bot randomly presses the SPACE key with a low probability each frame, ignoring the position of the blocks.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The game should handle the random inputs without crashing, correctly slicing blocks when they overlap, and triggering the GAME_OVER_LOSE state when a block misses completely.
